headline: Trump Nets $1.4B Crypto Gain Amid Ethics Concerns

article.title: Donald Trump says ‘nothing wrong’ with $1.4B crypto windfall while in office
article.summary: The US President disclosed earning more than $1 billion from crypto ventures amid discussions of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress and legislation to ban CBDCs awaiting his desk.

headline: EU Bans 90% Crypto Prediction Market Contracts

article.title: ESMA warns many prediction market event contracts already face EU retail ban
article.summary: The European regulator said companies cannot circumvent EU financial rules by marketing binary-style products as event contracts rather than derivatives.

headline: Crude Steady as Gulf Flows Reach 90% Capacity

article.title: Oil Is Little Changed as Persian Gulf Flows Near Pre-War Levels
article.summary: Oil prices were little changed in thin trading as the recovery of Persian Gulf flows fomented a new surplus in key parts of the global market.

headline: CPPIB Pours $1.75B into EQT AI Expansion

article.title: CPP Invests $1.75 Billion in EQT’s AI Buildout
article.summary: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board will invest $1.75 billion to support EQT Corp.’s artificial intelligence infrastructure buildout, it announced Friday.

headline: Zcash Ironwood Upgrade Imminent Amid 20% ZEC Price Plunge

article.title: Zcash Ironwood Upgrade Nears as Developers Work to Restore Confidence After ZEC Crash
article.summary: Developers say security testing has uncovered no new serious bugs as Zcash's Ironwood upgrade moves toward testnet activation.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges, Wiping $1M Off Portnoy's Holdings

article.summary: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy says he's down millions on Bitcoin, but he's intent on holding this time—even if it falls to zero.

headline: Bitcoin Deposits Surge 30%, Volatility Spikes Imminent

article.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin and altcoin exchange deposits have spiked, indicating higher volatility ahead
article.summary: Bitcoin deposits to exchanges recently climbed to nearly 49,000 BTC, "a rare extreme" seen only four other times this year, CryptoQuant said.

headline: Samsung, Dunamu Deny $1B OUSD Stablecoin Consortium Role

article.summary: Samsung and Dunamu are among Korean firms saying they were listed as members of the OUSD stablecoin consortium without prior consultation.
